flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Manatee Technical College fell 37% between 2006 and 2009 (39.3% → 24.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Manatee Technical College rose 12% between 2003 and 2005 ($2.3k → $2.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Manatee Technical College rose 42% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 1.5k).
